Story quest chain

Eldorado

9 parts

Systems6
Targets2
Rewards4

Chain Overview

StartRecycle Station
SystemMitrilion
Parts9
First questEldorado: Part 1

Travel / deliver to Sinensis

Route & Targets

  • System: Mitrilion
  • System: Vibrilian
  • System: Arrenius
  • System: Sarkinon
  • System: Zergilin
  • System: Fulzar
  • Location: Sinensis in Mitrilion
  • Location: Warp Gate in Vibrilian
  • Location: Osho's Upgrades in Arrenius
  • Location: Vlardenon in Sarkinon
  • Location: Glictan in Zergilin
  • Location: New Erath in Fulzar
  • Location: Lak in Fulzar
  • Items: Polyhedric Fabric, Hydrogen Oscillator

Part 1: Eldorado: Part 1

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to Sinensis

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Start at Recycle Station in Mitrilion.
  2. Travel to Sinensis.
  3. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  4. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 2.

Description

We have recieved a distress call from the planet Sinensis here in Mitrillion. Please investigate and rescue any survivors.

Completion

John McClain: ”Ahh… finally. Thank you for helping me good Sir, I’m a John, John McClain, a pioneer in planetary excavations. Yes, I have already filled your ship to the brim with tools needed for this expidition. Haven’t you heard about the new system Fulzar, the legend says its a golden paradise, with planets made of solid gold! But no time for small talk, I have been waiting for this opportunity for years now.

Part 2: Eldorado: Part 2

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 1000-1200

Travel / deliver to Warp Gate

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Warp Gate.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 3.

Description

Goto the Warp Gate in Vibrilian.

Completion

John McClain: “Ohhh…. the warp license is pretty expensive… well. I guess I could offer you a deal, a lot of people owe me money and I need someone to collect them for me. I will give you 5% if you do it quickly. I’m eager to look for new climbing gear in Hangar 2.”

Part 3: Eldorado: Part 3

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 20k Steel

Travel / deliver to Osho's Upgrades

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Osho's Upgrades.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 4.

Description

Land on Oshos Upgrades in Arrenius and collect the money he owes John.

Completion

John McClain: "The next guy that owes can be quite tricky to find. He is a missing AF Agent that was last seen on the planet Vlardenon in the Sarkinon system."

Part 4: Eldorado: Part 4

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 20k Steel

Travel / deliver to Vlardenon

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Vlardenon.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 5.

Description

Land on Vlardenon in Sarkinon and find the missing AF Agent that owes John a lot of money.

Completion

John McClain: "There is one more client that owes me money, but he is a nasty renegade fraud that laughed at me when I asked him to return my investment. Please don't reason with him!"

Part 5: Eldorado: Part 5

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 20k Steel

Travel / deliver to Glictan

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Glictan.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 6.

Description

Land on Glictan in Zergilin and collect money from a renegade fraud called Murxim.

Completion

John McClain: "That was the last one, you should have enough resources for Fulzar now, or at least not far from it. I will update my astrometric database, let me know when we are ready for Fulzar."

Part 6: Eldorado: Part 6

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission XP 2400-2800

Travel / deliver to New Erath

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to New Erath.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.
  3. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 7.

Description

Travel to New Erath in Fulzar and let John McClain see the new world with his own eyes.

Completion

John McClain: “Wow… this is really amazing! It was true, there are planets made of gold here, but unfortunately they are also guarded by a highly technological race. However, their small fighters seem to be made of some unknown material, if you destroy them I can detect and salvage some of it.”

Part 7: Eldorado: Part 7

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 20k Steel

Collect 10 Polyhedric Fabric

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 10 Polyhedric Fabric.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 8.

Description

Pick up 10 Polyhedric Fabric that we can trade for steel.

Completion

John McClain: “Ahh… yes, this is a spectacular material, its impervious to all kinds of energy weapons and almost impenetrable by physical force. No wonder the Aureus dominate this region of space. Ohh.. I almost forgot your share.

Now.. I have heard that rumours about an abstract kind of energy ship that the Aureus can project. When they are destroyed the projection oscillators sometimes stay intact. I would really love to get hold of one of those. Bring me with you and let me handle the tractor beam..”

Part 8: Eldorado: Part 8

CategoryStory
Typepickup
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 20k Steel

Collect 5 Hydrogen Oscillator

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 5 Hydrogen Oscillator.
  2. Turn in the quest to unlock Eldorado: Part 9.

Description

Find 5 Hydrogen Oscillator for John McClain so he can trade it for steel.

Completion

John McClain: “Wohooo! I can’t believe you made it. The crystal looks prestine and I will give you 10% of the market price. Yes, I always reward hard working people like you.

Now I have enough funding for my grand expedition, I want you to bring me down safely on the Kal sphere. I heard the spheres seem to have an atmosphere that can support life but that no lifeforms exist and its uncertain what the purpose of the spheres actually is.

Once I’m there I will start my excavation and see if I can reveal its origin and purpose.”

Part 9: Eldorado: Part 9

CategoryStory
Typetransport
Subtypen/a
Level range0
RewardMission 5xlvl90 Artifacts

Travel / deliver to Lak

Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Travel to Lak.
  2. Land or interact at the target location(s) to advance the quest.

Description

Bring John McClain to the surface of Lak so he can start the excavation.

Completion

John McClain: “Thank you again! I will start excavating the surface and then go deeper into the core. My expedition crew are already set and if you want to explore some yourself, feel free to do so. Here is your final reward.”

Want to improve this wiki? Contributions are welcome on github.com/guedesite/astroflux-wiki.
